title: ジャパンCの後に・覇王のその先へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a fierce battle, Meisho Doto wins against
T.M. Opera O. At last, the two establish a rivalry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto is delighted by this new
development in their relationship, while T.M.
Opera O is excited to have someone who will
encourage her growth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The change is not only internal: their lap times
also show improvement, convincing Air Shakur
the two have broken past their previous stat
ceiling.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's no longer certain who will emerge victorious in
the race against the previous generation. The two
head for the Arima Kinen as true competitors.
